rows.cycle_goal_summary: From empty inventory in a fresh flat fixture world, collect actor-owned wood, craft and place a crafting_table, craft and equip a wooden_pickaxe, then create a visible starter worksite marker or low wall using at least six actor-collected wood/plank/log blocks. Primary success requires runtime evidence for wooden_pickaxe plus visible placed-block structure progress; partial milestones are logs, planks, sticks, crafting_table item, placed crafting_table, wooden_pickaxe, equipped tool, and six placed structure blocks.
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=passed, tools=observe,collect_logs,wait, statuses=observe:ok, collect_logs:collected, wait:waited. Outcome contract=satisfied; expected=inventory_delta; observed=diagnostic_delta,inventory_delta.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Convert 1 oak_log to oak_planks and sticks using inventory 2x2 grid. Place crafting_table item on a verified valid surface (grass_block at y=63 or air space adjacent to actor) avoiding occupied log columns. If crafting_table is successfully placed, immediately craft wooden_pickaxe. Verify each step with runtime evidence before proceeding.
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=passed, tools=observe,craft_item,wait, statuses=observe:ok, craft_item:crafted, wait:waited. Outcome contract=satisfied; expected=inventory_delta; observed=diagnostic_delta,inventory_delta.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Convert 1 oak_log to oak_planks and sticks using inventory 2x2 grid. Place crafting_table item on a verified valid surface (grass_block at y=63 or air space adjacent to actor) avoiding occupied log columns. If crafting_table is successfully placed, immediately craft wooden_pickaxe. Verify each step with runtime evidence before proceeding.
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=failed, tools=observe,place_block, statuses=observe:ok, place_block:blocked. Outcome contract=blocked; expected=world_block_delta; observed=diagnostic_delta,blocker_recorded.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Select a specific grass_block coordinate from current world scan (e.g., x:7,y:63,z:-1 or x:8,y:63,z:-1) as the placement target for crafting_table. Execute placement using this explicit valid surface to satisfy the blocked constraint. Immediately upon successful placement, use the placed table to craft wooden_pickaxe. Verify placement success via runtime evidence before attempting craft.
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=failed, tools=place_block, statuses=place_block:blocked. Outcome contract=blocked; expected=world_block_delta; observed=blocker_recorded.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Execute place_block targeting coordinate (7,64,-1) or (8,64,-1) above a grass_block support. Verify placement via runtime evidence before attempting craft. Do not target oak_log coordinates or reuse previously timed-out exact args without coordinate change.
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=failed, tools=place_block, statuses=place_block:blocked. Outcome contract=blocked; expected=world_block_delta; observed=blocker_recorded.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Execute place_block targeting (6,64,-1) above grass_block at (6,63,-1). If blocked, fallback to (7,64,-2) above grass at (7,63,-2). Verify placement via runtime block update or world scan before attempting craft. Do not reuse (8,64,-1) or (7,64,-1) without new evidence of clearance.
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=failed, tools=place_block, statuses=place_block:blocked. Outcome contract=blocked; expected=world_block_delta; observed=blocker_recorded.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Execute place_block for crafting_table at (7,64,-2). Confirm success via blockUpdate or world scan. Do not reuse (8,64,-1), (7,64,-1), or (6,64,-1).
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=passed, tools=place_block, statuses=place_block:placed. Outcome contract=satisfied; expected=world_block_delta; observed=world_block_delta.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Execute place_block for crafting_table at (7,64,-2). Confirm success via blockUpdate or world scan. Do not reuse (8,64,-1), (7,64,-1), or (6,64,-1).

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Check inventory for sticks; if absent, craft sticks from oak_planks using inventory grid. Then use craft_with_table for wooden_pickaxe at (7,64,-2). Confirm wooden_pickaxe appears in inventory or held item.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Check inventory for sticks; if absent, craft sticks from oak_planks using inventory grid. Then use craft_with_table for wooden_pickaxe at (7,64,-2). Confirm wooden_pickaxe appears in inventory or held item.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Execute craft_with_table for wooden_pickaxe at (7,64,-2) with current inventory. Do not craft additional sticks or planks. Do not observe unless craft fails with a new diagnostic indicating positional or interaction error.
